## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI, NCLT, Complex Urban LiDAR — `source_fact`; manual, p. 5–6, § IV-A. Dataset and Experimental Settings, Table I;Fig. 5
- **input_unit:** single 3D LiDAR scan — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–3, § I. Introduction;III. Scan Context for Place Recognition, Fig. 2
- **invariances:** yaw/heading rotation, point-density robustness, surface-normal robustness, limited translation robustness via 8-way root-shift augmentation — `source_fact`; manual, p. 2–4, § I. Introduction;III-A. Scan Context;III-B. Similarity Score, Fig. 3;Eq. 6-7
- **representation:** polar top-view maximum-height matrix, ring/sector discretization, ring-key retrieval, circular-column-shift cosine matching — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–4, § I. Introduction;III-A. Scan Context;III-B. Similarity Score;III-C. Two-Phase Search, Fig. 1-4;Eq. 1-10
- **uses_learning:** no — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–2, § Abstract;I. Introduction
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 2–3, § I. Introduction;III. Scan Context for Place Recognition, Fig. 2
